channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: /BBBY/ - Larry Cheng went onto Theppshow edition — 139 replies — 220.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
/BBBY/ - Larry Cheng went onto Theppshow edition

Open thread • Replies: 139 • Updated: 2026-07-06 19:48 UTC

OP

>rc buys 7,780,000 shares of BBBY, and $60-$80 strike calls worth 1,670,100 shares in March 2022

>rc sells shares and calls of BBBY in august 2022

>rc has a sitdown with a famous corporate raider, Carl Icahn in october 2022

>rc offers 400 million for BBBY in December 2022

>pitchbook (best M&A software suite in the world, costing 5 figures + per year) lists BBBY(now known as BBBYQ or DK-Butterfly-1) as sold via a leveraged buyout on January 13 2023

>a default on the ABL with JPM happened on the same day that pitchbook shows a leveraged buyout, the terms of that ABL specify that a default is triggered if a change of control happens, a change of control is defined as an acquisition of 40% or more of the voting power by any person or group.

>one month later, February 2023 RC tweets “someone tell the government to stop shooting down my balloons”, alluding to bad actors delaying the Bed Bath m&a

>the GameStop CEO then became a BBBYQ chapter 11 creditor and debtor

>Larry cheng (who helped RC build Chewy, and is a current boardmember at GameStop, and a close personal friend to RC) went onto theppshow podcast (which is dedicated to BBBY recovery theories) 8 months after BBBY filed for chapter 11, and 2 months after shares were cancelled

>OverStock - who is the most famous company to battle illegal naked shorts, who even released a crypto dividend 5 years ago - purchased the BBBY IP, and owns 55% of TZero - the only approved blockchain entity who can issue debt instruments and securities

>OverStock - whos now traded under ticker BBBY - has issued warrants with dates that match GME's warrants, and with a CUSIP-6 that matches BBBYQ's CUSIP-6, proving BBBYQ has already begun m&a activity with BBBY


REQUIRED READING: bbbwhy.com

>Larry Cheng and Bill Pulte have gone onto theppshow podcast

jake2b started a youtube channel to access quality BBBYQ easier than scrolling twitter posts:

https://www.youtube.com/@jake2b

previous thread:
>>62417410

Early replies (first 3)

62438274
>Larry Cheng was inside the PP show

62438733
Good morning my beautiful Towelkings.

62438734
uh... guys... you might want to check your accounts...

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62445900
>>62445859
Yea but like, most of us cum every day at least.

62445941
>>62445705
A silly shilly
Being a seethy weethy
Built for GME

62446010
>>62445859
I'm going to frame the picture of Jake on the couch and put it up in my mansion. When guests will ask who he is, I'll smirk and say "you wouldn't get it."

62446088
>>62445569

62446106
>>62445576
>>62445600
>>62445645

spot on

62446149
>>62446088
They leave trading open so smart people can sell "for tax purposes" and get the loss on their tax return. I guess they think idiots buying 7 biĺion worthless securities for 8 cents each is funny,,,,,i do

62446238
>>62445569
what is this image even from?

62446242
>>62446238
wait I found it:

https://www.timesofisrael.com/us-hockey-team-owner-suspended-after-social-media-spat-with-fan-over-gaza-war/

HOLY SHIT ITS FROM 2024. Imagine what him seething at RC has done to him since?

62446288
>>62446242
Hes 60 years old whats the joke here?

62446344
>>62446242
<suspended


Lmao so nothing happened to him except a meaningless press release BBBYbbqers cant stop losing

62446386
>>62446344
the real fun starts when the rico roundup is in full swing. But even better is when cash and new equity is distributed to previous BBBYQ holders.

Guess what happens when tzero gets involved.

62446441
>>62446386
>Guess what happens when tzero gets involved.

Your $0 stays $0

62447283
CUSIP-6

62447659
Ryan Cohen confirmed AGAIN that bathroom gods have won by posting on X that shows he has ties to the Icahn family. Shills will immediately come out of the woodwork now that I bring this up. It's over shills, we won. It's been 100% confirmed.

62447686
>>62447659
it's not brett icahn's fiance the birthmarks don't match

62447756
Baggie general

62447918
>>62447756

62448131
lamestop holders are seething because they missed out on the true moass. bathroom gods are the chosen ones. they trusted the plan above all. the cancellation of shares was the ultimate IQ test. weaker people couldn't handle that. now they are filled with regret.

62448146
>>62448131
The silo around BBBY was truly impressive. Superstonk made no mention of it. /GME/ was a full blown silo as well. It wasn't until I looked at the option chain on BBBY and saw the insane volatility that made me look in to it further. Greatest decision of my life.

62449186
>>62449050
all of them are short bbbyq. i guarantee it

62449344
>>62449050
>>62449186
If you are assassinated, does your short position get closed? Asking for Brian Thompson

62449448
>>62449344
Nope. His estate would get liquidated to pay off to buy back the shares.

62450370
CUSIP-6

62450461
>>62448146
The silo around eBay has become palpable

62452261
she has high res photos on her facebook. you can compare the birthmarks on her arm. the redditors are stupid as fuck it's demoralizing.

62452270
it seems that sultan didn't tweet about teddy like i thought he did. fuck's sake.

62452287
>>62452270
Its right here can you stop whining like a fatherless attention starved faggot? Youre scaring the hoes.

https://x.com/Almaadeed/status/2072817361862717939

62452325
>>62452287
ok good it displays the gamestop.com preview on the twitter page but the link he posted is to teddy.com which redirects to gamestop.com

item.title: Saylor sold 3,588 BTC — 49 replies — 196.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Saylor sold 3,588 BTC

Open thread • Replies: 49 • Updated: 2026-07-06 20:13 UTC

OP

Saylor sold 3,588 BTC

Early replies (first 3)

62450542
such a comedy

buy high, sell low

mutts are cuckolds, france would conquer them in two weeks

62450550
>>62450537
Where Michael? Where?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62451042
>>62450537
Honestly impressed how well the market absorbed this. Bullish as fuck. Death spiral believers on suicide watch

62451044
All it takes is Strategy bot buying for the bottom to drop out.
Actively selling is death.
Not sure why people still thing your average retard and third worlder is propping up the market at this level.

62451049
>>62451042
>this is fine

62451053
>>62451039
His average acquisition price is $63k, no biggie

62451081
>>62451053
fuck off saylor

62451088
>>62450537
Paper handed bitch

62451132
>>62451039
Who cares whether they sell a tiny amount at a loss?
Your type will also celebrate unrealized losses, then disappear when the company will inevitably sit on unrealized gains again some time.
These metrics are meaningless in a treasury like this with no liquidation price, and which is massively over-collateralized. You only want to distract with your useless garbage.
>>62451081
You piece of shit started out claiming he bought at $120k, the other guy is at least closer. Per FIFO accounting we could also look at his oldest coins purchased in 2020 around $10k, in which case he just made a 500% profit. That's another useless distraction in your style.

62451164
>>62450537
DO NOT REDEEM SAAR

62451185
>>62451132
oh man you seem emotionally invested

enjoy holding the bags i guess

62451188
>>62451132
A 500% profit, well after 50% inflation more like 300%. That's why we use average, and that is 75k. Now factor in inflation and we are at 85k at the very least. Still quite a loss to sell at 60k.

62451234
>>62451185
You are useful in the sense that a crowd of your kind dominated the price action in the past few weeks, so even a very superficial reality check showed that Strategy was on sale, and you contributed to that discount.
I did load up those past two weeks, yes. Now that I'm done, I'm getting a little tired with these rumors, half-truths and other parroted garbage because I've read enough of it. I don't think of myself as particularly emotional, you can tell yourself that if it makes you feel better.

62451251
>>62450537
saylorcoin is FUCKED till this cuck is out

62451267
>>62450537
>unlimited dividends forever

62451294
>>62450537
He sold? Pump it

62451302
>>62451234
To the chair you go, cuck!

62451550
>>62451036
>>babby's first dead cat bounce
HAHAHA

62451591
saylor bought every top and now he is going to sell every bottom?

62451626
>>62450537
we goin 2 da mewn baby

62451629
>>62450537
https://x.com/Overdose_AI/status/2074139052563980439
What a shithead btw.

62451634
HE SODLED

62451659
>>62450537
Kinda funny that the dividend payments are 2x more than just taking out a loan on your bitcoin.

62452014
>>62451044
>Shitcoin seller says shitcoin needed, more at 8 pm!

62452040
>MicroStrategy's average purchase price for Bitcoin is approximately $75,476 per coin.

HAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHA

62452054
>lose principle
>gain dividend
savvy investing

62452068
>buy high
>sell low

62452073
What do you call this strategy?

62452111
>>62451132
holy copium, i feel bad for you ngl

62452379
>>62451013
He bought those coins for less than 10k a coin.

Sure he will say it's an accounting loss on paper, but Saylor is ahead of the game.

62452424
>selling the bottom
He could have sold them for literally double last year top kek

62452435
>>62450537
This marks the bottom.

item.title: BEARISH ON COSTCO — 46 replies — 122.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
BEARISH ON COSTCO

Open thread • Replies: 46 • Updated: 2026-07-06 20:03 UTC

OP

People are scamming costcos lenient return policy now. Should we short COST?

Video:
https://x.com/Basedgoymemes/status/2073860759269077199

Early replies (first 3)

62449396
based

62449400
I wouldn't call jeets 'people'

62449441
Fuck this racist, post the person who started to do this was some white bitch, she did it for 12 years

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62449846
>>62449769

62449850
>>62449770
But you dont. Why? are you lazy or a coward or just a blowhard incel?

62449862
>>62449388
Izzat status?

62449895
>>62449850
I'm a lazy coward blowhard incel but at least I'm making decent money from my investments.

62450126
>>62449846
kek

62450247
SAAAAAAARS

62450251
>>62449388
>Buy gold at Costco.
>Return when price gone up.
>Free money

62450253
>>62449388
Wtf is wrong with indians?

62450259
>>62450251
?
You would get the same money that you paid when you bought it you fucking mongoloid.

62450296
>>62450251
Can’t return gold

62450328
>>62449441
Go back, Sukdeep

62450386
>>62450253
Why did you let them take over?

62450507
>>62449388
Just slit his throat if you're the customer behind. This is a fixable problem

62450508
>>62449716
>Poodia
It's called Fecalia, anon

62450519
>>62450507
>COSTCO Anonymous
White incels demanding someone else do their man work

62450613
>>62450251
Leave it to the goyim to exchange literal gold for literal paper and think they're getting one up on you.

62450617
>>62450613
Only morons think gold us a good investment

62450619
>>62449388
stock prices have nothing to do with how profitable a company is

62450628
>>62450251
Brown poojeet IQ in display. Receipts exist.

62451091
>>62450617
good goy

62451501
>>62451091
Ngl you should port only a fraction of your wealth in boomer rocks. There’s always a small chance asteroid mining isn’t a meme and boomer rocks does a -99% overnight.

62451725
jugaad

62451765
>>62449441
shut the fuck up jeet, you aren't even potty trained plus your people actually eat cow shit

62451803
>>62450251
Can't return gold.
BUT if you buy it online and don't sign for it twice it automatically goes back to Costco and you get a refund (source, happened to me).
So you could use this for speculation on gold- if you buy it and the price drops before you receive it just don't sign for it.

62451853
>>62451765
You are jelly of our success

62451899
>>62451853
Cope

62451948
>>62451899
Indians are winning

62452213
>>62451948
Seethe

62452229
>>62449388
Why would this be bearish? It increased their DEI score and that means they get infinite free loans from blackrock

62452396
>>62449441
Karen means victory

item.title: Now that I've made it I'm wondering if it's worth dumping $6,000 on having a foursome with 3 high class STD-tested escor… — 29 replies — 116.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Now that I've made it I'm wondering if it's worth dumping $6,000 on having a foursome with 3 high class STD-tested escor…

Open thread • Replies: 29 • Updated: 2026-07-06 20:22 UTC

OP

Now that I've made it I'm wondering if it's worth dumping $6,000 on having a foursome with 3 high class STD-tested escorts.

Surely there's other rich anons here that have played out that fantasy? How was it? Anything you'd do differently if you had to do it again?

This is financial advice since although I won't miss that amount of money on a once-in-a-lifetime night I still want to get my money's worth.

Early replies (first 3)

62450611
Nigga thinks he's in a porn video lmao

62450618
>>62450597
Do you live in brazil or something? Three "high class" escorts in the US would rape you for 4k a piece

62450623
>>62450611
Yeah pretty much lol but keep in mind I'm 40 so I've had my time to think about what it is I really want in life before my time is up and this is one of those. Like, I know it's not going to be like in a porn video I'm not naive but I'm hoping to at least experience some of the acts only possible with three other women.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62450626
>>62450618
Not Brazil but also not US. Yeah, I checked and in the US it's quite a bit more expensive but I think pretty much everything is more expensive in the US right now for obvious reasons lol.

62450640
>>62450626
Go ahead bro but honestly you'd have more fun just fucking their holes all night one by one instead of having some awkward foresome where you coom in 15 minutes then sit there with 3 coke addicted whores sitting in your place making small talk

62450814
>>62450640
>where you coom in 15 minutes
Don't worry I have my pharma game down so I'm sure that won't be the case. Besides I'm fine with watching for a while at any rate.

62450815
>>62450597
net worth?

62450816
>>62450640
Also I've done enough "one-by-one" in my life that I'm specifically not interested in that. The fantasy is more than one but might as well go big hence three more than one.

62450820
>>62450815
Mid 7

62450825
the std test will be forged

enjoy hiv, hsv and monkey..pox

62450830
>>62450597
Two women is already conspicuous consumption. Three is egregious. I've has threesomes with two women and it just turns into more work for you, not a joke. Women don't work to please men. >>62450597

62450852
>>62450825
>the std test will be forged
Hope not but is that really a popular thing they do especially if they're asking for so much? A test is like $50 here.

>>62450830
>and it just turns into more work for you
I'm ok with that. In fact I'm hoping for that. Was an amateur athlete in my youth and have kept up my physical fitness. Even now in 1-on-1 most women can't keep up. But enough bragging. Duly noted. Genuinely interested to hear other anons experiences as well.

One thing I'm worried about is if the women aren't interested... Since I'll be paying them what if they're just like dead fish or worse...

62450955
>paying woman to pretend to enjoy having sex with you
>paying three woman to pretend to enjoy having sex with you at the same time
they're all going to be dry as fuck

62451014
>>62450597
I've had a couple of threesomes with high end 10/10s and it's generally not worth it beyond doing it once just to have tried it. It's fucking exhausting and you can only cum a couple of times anyway

62451329
>>62450955
Yeah not gonna lie that would suck... Hate having to re-lube.

>>62451014
>it's generally not worth it
>It's fucking exhausting
Could you elaborate? Genuinely interested in your experience.

62451420
>>62450597
Two is already a lot to manage. Maybe start out with a threesome? If you can handle that go to four
Running out of stamina on three is a real risk even on drugs, I imagine it'd be very disappointing

62451458
>>62450852
Look man, it's your money. I just don't want you to come into it with high expectations and then it falls short. I'm glad I got it out of my system, and I don't regret it, but if I was offered one today if be on the fence. Maybe that's just what being past 30 feels like.

62451484
>>62451458
>I just don't want you to come into it with high expectations and then it falls short.
Thanks. I appreciate it. Truly. I'm just relating my history expectations as well. Did you go through an agency or independent? I'm planning on independent because then I figure they should at least have the experience to know how to actually behave like they're interested and whatnot.

62451490
>>62451420
>Maybe start out with a threesome?
It's a one-and-done for me so I'd rather just go all-out and like I said before I'm already sure I'm physically capable.

62451497
>>62451458
>Maybe that's just what being past 30 feels like.
Off-topic but there was a period of about a year where I didn't work out too much and lost physical fitness I'll never get back. But in your case I'm sure if you run and hit the gym you'll feel much MUCH younger again. I still mog the vast majority of people in their 20s fitness-wise and like I said I just turned 40.

62451571
>>62451329
you should never have to lube for sex anon..

62451780
Just do it, ravage those whores like you would in your dreams, thats what's "making it" is all about right?

62451787
>>62451780
>making it
>paying for sex

wew

62451846
>>62451484
I was approached by the pair of women while at a club on both occasions.

62452092
>>62451787
Why do you think there's a drought of luxury escorts everywhere else in the world during the annual WEF? It's because all the top escorts go there because all the most powerful men on the planet pay for pussy. You think they waste time on tinder? No, they pay for prime pussy.

Time is money, and you're wasting a lot of time trying to fuck mediocre pussy

62452170
>>62450816
>I've done enough "one-by-one" in my life that I'm specifically not interested in that
>>62450852
>One thing I'm worried about is if the women aren't interested... Since I'll be paying them what if they're just like dead fish or worse

If you want to do it right you need to dip in the scene in your area with some one-on-ones to figure out the optimal combination of girls. Girls all have certain girls they play well with and enjoy working with. If you're just going in cold with 3 random whores who have never met each other you're heavily stacking the odds against yourself having a good time. I've done a few threesomes with paid girls and the best times were always with their SW BFFs, who of course I only choose if they are also hot.

62452201
>>62450623
They're prostitutes so have them do the dirtyest shit. Get your ass eatin the entire time. I personally would start off with a classy 3way footjob

62452205
>>62452092
In my mid 20s living in Boston I was able to pull a new girl off tinder almost every day with minimal effort. I had a rotation going for a while. These are 18-22 WASP college chicks attending elite universities with minimal or sometimes zero body counts. They're there because they want to fuck you. There's nothing more validating. No lube or condoms required. That is the definition of prime pussy.

paying for luxury escorts is a cope for men who never could or can no longer experience this

62452461
>>62452205
You're in your mid-20s. Almost nobody has made it financially at your age. Come back when you're 35 and see how that shit goes for you.

Of course pulling young women is easy when you're young yourself. When you're pushing 40, you'll have to put in an insane amount of effort to bag top tier women in their early 20s, and the free juice is simply not worth the squeeze

item.title: THE cuckolds of crypto — 54 replies — 43.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
THE cuckolds of crypto

Open thread • Replies: 54 • Updated: 2026-07-06 19:11 UTC

OP

>2021
$53

>2026
$7

Early replies (first 3)

62447356
yep

62447358
>turkish peeler laughing at anyone
Where's your wife and kids Adem?

62447360
>>62447358
Not Adem

He won btw, cuckolds lost (check the price)

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62450826
>>62450669
Have you ever questioned why every crypto has reached peak shitcoin performance and every crypto has baggies and every crypto has a fanboy cult and almost every crypto in 2026 has quite literally been proven useless except LINK has genuine large scale adoption, yet for some reason it’s the only token with a tiny baby army of dedicated fudlords? When LINK was at its peak it was doing like $300-500M+ daily volume. All the new crypto entrants were top buying left and right, including those who bought LINK. The only difference is those who top bought LINK had their conviction reaffirmed over and over as Chainlink continued to see real, useful adoption, but price fizzled out while other scams got PnD’d left and right.

These are your fuddies. They hold LINK, and held from a high price down to a low one. Some eventually sold but are so mind broken every time they see CLL having success they became obsessed. Some still hold and actually believe they’re going to be rich one day but are completely mind broken and it won’t really matter if they get rich because their brains are warped and they’ll never be happy.

Almost none can really understand the crypto market is still in an infant stage. Price action for LINK right now is as meaningless as it is for every other shitcoin. Those of us with brains know we are waiting for crypto to finally get real air time, which we are just around the corner from. It took way longer than I think many expected, but it’s happening. Unfortunately for fuddies they got cooked along the way and won’t ever see the true benefits of making it.

I do feel bad for them. Born weak of spirit and mind yet somehow found themselves in a dungeon of chaos. They were never going to live happily.

62450831
>>62450805
And?

62450838
>>62450831
and you're a poor cuckold shilling a dead shitcoin. You were probably blaming "muh Bulgarian" in 2022. Fuck off to twitter poorfag and keep upvoting Sergey's and ChainlinkGod's tweets you retarded cuck

62450845
>>62450826
>Le fuddies bought the top!!!!
Another deranged cuckold baggie

Chainlink will never reach $53 again. Keep spamming /biz/ and defending LINK I'm sure you'll get rich anyday now

62450846
>>62450838
Why are you so emotional about this? Why do you even care a little bit?

62450855
>>62450846
>emotional
stop projecting kek. I just love mocking cucks like you. Have you upvoted ChainlinkGod's latest tweet like a good cuck today?

62450859
>>62450758
You sound upset. Sounds like Lyrica might offer some relief! >>62450242

62450885
>>62450855
>getting this upset about other people's investments

62450886
>>62450855
the druggie old fart lashes out kek what a sad existence holy fuck i feel better already

62450905
>>62450886
that's great but you're a poor cuckold who's been bagholding a 2017 shitcoin for 9 years. Is mommy angry about your investment? kek

62450906
this entire thread reeks of severe mental illness
>muh adoption muh fuddies muh this muh that
this shitcoin has been on a downwards spiral for 7 years, bagholders objectively deserve all the mocking they get and that's all I have to say

62450908
>>62450845
>keep spamming /biz/
posting that in one of 14 active fud threads is hilarious

62450910
>>62450906
they're called the "cuckolds of crypto" for a reason just look at the amount of SEETHE they have whenever somebody mentions the price

62450917
>>62450906
>this entire thread reeks of severe mental illness
Welcome to 4chins, feel free to leave. Reddit is down the hall and to the left.

62450925
kek, it's also extremely amusing how offended the bagholders feel, they literally cannot stop giving me (You)s when all I did is ask a simple question
lol, lmao even

62450929
>>62450925
Here is another one. Are you a (You) slut?

62450935
kek, absolutely buttblasted

62450967
>>62450935
>tfw anon thinks it's actually a form of punishment to not give (You)s
That's hot. Might think about this later while relapsing on porn, cocaine and Lyrica.

62450977
>>62450967
posting on 4chan high on cocaine is actually fun as fuck. I unironically did it several times

62450981
>pls engage with my posts, pls plsnI swear I'm not paid based on the (You)s I get, so pls give me some attention!
complete desperation
I'm beginning to believe that all this delusional gloating is clickbaiting after all
kek

62450988
>>62447354
rather Polkadot

62451086
>>62450977
I'm not surprised. Do you have IBS as well?

>>62450981
The negging is working extremely well, holy moly. Have you been dabbling with those PUA courses anon?

62451293
>>62450977
>>62451086
Oh nvm, you are OP but you switched IDs. Gotcha. No wonder you're so riled up lmao. Momma's little gassy boy!

62451315
could you imagine spending the long holiday weekend compiling a collage of a random dude jerking off? mind you while being the best years of your life. your peers are out at pools, on boats, at the beach, at bars, etc... but you're making the collage

and your reason: because he posted the price of your shitcoin that is lower now than it was in 2020

beyond grim

nobody, and i mean NOBODY, takes an absolute C U C K H O L D I N G quite like a link marine... and then comes back time and time again, absolutely BEGGING for more

THE Cuckolds of crypto

62451350
>>62451315
Nice rant, just want to quickly interject here to mention that the current collage does not depict jerk off habits, but rather issues with substance abuse and - excuse the grossness - gastrointestinal issues causing bloating, excessive gas, and most likely some leaky gut as well. Poor fella.

62451358
>>62451350
that's great but you're poor lol

62451370
>>62451358
>t. 36 and financially unstable drug addict

62451396
>>62451358
Like you, I also can afford to buy cocaine 5 times a month, but I prefer not to since cocaine is a shit drug. Do you really think that makes you rich? Lmao. Also, try not eating slop instead of self medicating with coke and Lyrica when your IBS flares up, you fucking dolt.

62451464
And just like that Chainlink(ticker: LINK) will never be below $8 again!

62452183
>>62450229
>>62450242
>>62450257
>>62450320
fucking LMAOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOO

62452469

item.title: Bargaining skill — 8 replies — 23.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
Bargaining skill

Open thread • Replies: 8 • Updated: 2026-07-06 20:05 UTC

OP

How do you get custom videos from women on onlyfans and fansly for the least amount of money when negotiating with them in their dms?

I’m obviously only referring to dealing with young women on OF who are new to the platform and industry and don’t have much followers or money.

In my experience if you just tell them what kind of video you want and then ask how much they charge prices vary wildly from girl to girl even though it is same video request and the girls are similar level of attractiveness, nationality, follower count, etc
But when I name a price like 50 dollars for a 5 minute video sometimes she will say no then I will say lmk if you change your mind and she never does

How do you negotiate?

>SIMP

I agree if you spend a large amount such as more than a few percent of your income on porn you have an issue and I agree that if you are spending significant amounts of money on women who have lots of money and followers then that is a waste.

Early replies (first 3)

62446509
Bump

62449324
>>62446448
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=XkNsNKgSvAY

62449339
>>62446448
Anon, love does not praise the works of iniquity. You're aiding the collapse of your own society.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62449402
Shop around? Ask several at once, then take the best offer, there's no point haggling for 20% off when the another girl only wants half. You'll never run out of e-thots.

62450095
imagine getting a oneitis for porn from some average thot when porn is basically free, what you are doing is extremely pathetic, being an addict is one thing, being addicted to a person is something else entirely

62452342
>>62449402
That’s true but each are hot in their own way also there’s only so many hot new ethots since I am very picky

62452364
>>62449339
Accelerationism

62452405
>>62450095
Certain niches have only a couple of good videos or a couple dozen so what if you have watched them all

item.title: AI is dying — 19 replies — 16.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
AI is dying

Open thread • Replies: 19 • Updated: 2026-07-06 19:16 UTC

OP

>Over the weekend, I got a message from a tech company CEO outlining his TOTAL BAN ON AI across his organization. There are no exclusions. It is not limited to generative AI. It is not temporary. It is a full stop.
>It turns out that the corporate dream of a single “100x” human managing hordes of AI agents isn’t the optimal way to run a business

Sorry not sorry, you've been warned multiple times but kept throwing money into casino chips aka AI stocks.

https://www.inc.com/joe-procopio/the-first-company-wide-ai-ban-just-hit-my-inbox-heres-what-it-means/91357535

Early replies (first 3)

62449971
>The Ban on AI Research
>The CEO’s company had been dealing with a slump in conversion rates for the better part of 2026
>Turns out, AI-assisted research had resulted in casting a much wider net for prospects and dragged in many that were not nearly a fit. In some cases, the companies were defunct, and in one case, the company didn’t exist at all. The best the CEO could figure is that AI had just inferred it into existence

62449974
>The Ban on AI Agents
>One of the agents broke, in that was unable to scrape data it needed to generate a report. Its solution was to just generate the report anyway and then to freak out about the sudden change in what that report was saying, now that it was missing foundational information but treating it as if that entire business line had suddenly gone to zero.
>“It took a week to figure it out, because the guy who created the agent wasn’t the guy responsible for the report, and he was stalling while re-running months’ worth of reports by hand.”

62449977
>The Ban on Vibe Coding
>The reporting failure was the trigger for the ban.
>“When I discovered we had two different versions of the same module in our platform, connected to two different databases filled with two different sets of data stored in two completely different and unrelated [schemas], the next day I put the ban in place.”

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62449981
>>62449963
I'm happy for you, or sorry that happened to you.

62449983
>>62449963
>believing corporate media slop intended to make poorfags stay out

62450012
>>62449983
>they don't want us to make money

62450055
>>62449963
>single “100x” human managing hordes of AI agents isn’t the optimal way to run a business

It is, but there is so little "100x" human and definitely no one is working for that specific company.

62450135
>>62450012
Speaking for myself, I do not like the idea of poors entering my country club.

62450162
>>62449963
It isn't dying, but people are waking up to the fact that it's not "Jarvis, run my company" situation and that there is a hard skill curve to coordinating agent pipelines.

62450194
>>62450012
True, but the game is already rigged for the casino either way.

62450337
Not reading all that but AI isn't going anywhere, the pace may slow down but it's not going to be binned off.

62450351
CEOniggers once again proven to be 40 IQ retards.

62450414
>>62449963
Our CEO is going all-in on AI for software development and it has boosted our throughput by 2-3x. It's not slop code, either.
We have unlimited tokens.
t. SWE at startup

62450423
>>62449963
Over the weekend my ceo told me we are adopting more ai

62452074
>>62450414
>It's not slop code
lol. LMAO even

62452087
>inc.com
What
>a tech ceo
Which company

62452090
>>62450012
>rich people investing 3 trillion into AI the last 4 years
>Nvidia a 5 trillion dollar company
>the AI market is over now, because it's over
Makes you think.

62452160
>>62450135
Exactly. There is the door so would you kindly leave?

62452209
Kek my company banned it years ago when some high level executive fed sensitive financial data to chat gpt. It qas back when chat gpt was new and novel and he was probably a boomer that didn't know what chatbots are and thought it was a super intelligence.

cop five haircuts at the same time

foie gras bust of Albert Einstein

62444865

62445520

item.title: Newfag (psychiatrist student) here — 7 replies — 12.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
Newfag (psychiatrist student) here

Open thread • Replies: 7 • Updated: 2026-07-06 19:52 UTC

OP

From a psychiatric perspective the word "cuckold" triggers Link marines so much because subconsciously they know it's their true nature. Imagine holding a premined token with terrible tokenomics for 9 years hoping to make it just to see your shitcoin trading at single digits while getting outperformed by the entire market. Meanwhile you stake your measly tokens for bond tier gains (4% APR) despite weekly -30% crashes. The cherry on top of the cake is Sergey who stringed along the community while he made $500 million by dumping on gullible retail investors while they worshipped him as a deity. The cuckold nature of the Link marine is an undeniable reality. As with every cult pointing out the truth is often uncomfortable for the cult members. But the truth is....Link marines are simply cuckolds.

Early replies (first 3)

62452106
everyone who has bought any crypto in the last 5 years is a cuck

62452135
>>62452106
true. but here, we make fun of linkies
we do this because they are bad people
pic rel, remember when 15 was seen as a very low price? lmaooooo

62452192
>>62452106
True, but Linkies win the title

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62452199
>psychiatrist student
it would be medical student or intern you larping retard
now delete and try again later

62452228
>>62452199
I study at King's in London, cope and seethe cuck

62452319
>>62452228
sounds like a brothel that sells fried chicken, get me a 2 piece next time you're in town.

item.title: Would you eat a baby for 30000 LINK? — 5 replies — 8.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
Would you eat a baby for 30000 LINK?

Open thread • Replies: 5 • Updated: 2026-07-06 19:50 UTC

OP

Would you eat a baby for 30000 LINK?

Early replies (first 3)

62452053
>>62452048
Most Linkies would unironically do that because they're deranged cuckolds who worship a Saturnian/Jewish token (even if they never got rich off it)

I wouldn't though because my sould is worth much more than some premined shitcoin

62452190
>>62452048
What color is the baby?

62452215
>>62452048
I dont want AIDS

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62452247
>>62452048
I would do it for free.

62452338
30000 link is gonna be like four cents soon so no

item.title: I've been a NEET for a long time and I'm finally trying to get a job. — 71 replies — 93.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
I've been a NEET for a long time and I'm finally trying to get a job.

Open thread • Replies: 71 • Updated: 2026-07-06 19:40 UTC

OP

I've been a NEET for a long time and I'm finally trying to get a job. I'm not young, 40 next year, and don't have a job history or references. High school graduate.
How fucked am I?

Early replies (first 3)

62449979
I live in California, too.

62449982
What did you do for the last 23 years? Hard to help without more context. Do you have skills?

62449989
>>62449982
Depression and NEET means not in education employment or training.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62451269
You keep acting like I did something wrong. I did all the hoop jumps I was supposed when I was younger. Nobody wanted to hire me then. I gave up for a while, the depression or whatever hit. But that wasn't my fault, I needed help but all I got was abuse. Just like this thread.

62451296
>>62451269
Yeah, life is a bitch, but you are supposed to have figured this out in your 20s, not at 40. Still, not everything is lost, but you have to change your mentality. I guess you watched a shitload of animus in your free time. Do the MCs keep whining and bitching? Or do they keep struggling against all odds until they achieve their goal? You need to have your typical shonen MC mentality from now on anon.

62451331
>>62451296
I guess it doesn't really matter. I have to turn my life around somehow anyway.
But the raw hatred pouring out at me from this thread, my God.

62451339
you have two options, one is to find a way to move to a third world (classical sense, not total shithole with no food) country that doesn't already have a tourist scene and teach English for about half of what a licensed professional would earn. the other is to day trade and hopefully snowball that money into something usable

62451345
>>62451269
How did you spend a typical day for the past 15 years? Did you develop any unique skills or creative hobbies that could be leveraged into potential employment?

62451382
>>62450851
OP is right

62451403
>>62451345
Mostly videogames and books. After my Internet got cut off by my mother after an argument I just kept to my room a awhile and apparently fell into a deep depression. My early attempts to get a job flopped for the most part and since I'm miles away from town with no car or driver's license that was kinda it. There's no jobs in the middle of the woods at the end of a freeway.
And then Dad got sick so I had to help Mom take care of him until he died, and now my mother is nearly as bad off as my dad was so we need either a live-in nurse or to put her in a nurse home, because I can't take care of her by myself.

62451415
>>62451331
People hold on dearly to doing what is considered the normal path in the world is. They fight it like life or death because it is what their entire psyche grasps onto for safety. They get comforted by putting down anyone who doesn’t align to that path. They rebel at the concept a deadbeat 40 year old could still work and get lucky enough to get ahead of them, or an alcoholic who fails out of high school could sober up and start a wildly successful business. The concepts of grace and redemption are against their worldview that they alone steered their life how it “should” be

62451426
>>62449961
> 40 next year, and don't have a job history or references. High school graduate.
How fucked am I?

I'm a neet who occasionally gets bored and decide to work regular jobs.

I come into the interview drunk and my resume is 100% made up because I tend to quit these jobs after a few weeks.

Literally just lie and make shit up that lines up with where you are trying to get hired.

62451507
>>62451403
Damn that sucks, but like I said earlier now that you have nothing it's a great time to leave your country and to travel, get a backpack and start trekking

62451523
>>62451041
Whoever facilitated OP's deadly inertia really fucked him over.

62451539
>>62451523
There are people who have worked all their lives who still have nothing lmao, maybe you're one of them

62451705
For added, free bullshit, I have several teeth with severe cavities. Some have broken off and the gums grew back over them. One is basically hollow.

62451718
>>62451403
You could leverage this experience with your parents into being a personal care aid or home health aide for other sick and elderly patients. These jobs often struggle to find local workers and have to hire international workers after proving that they could not find a local to take the job. Even rural areas and full of old sick boomers and its growing.

62451719
>>62451331
Truth you don't want to hear isn't hatred. Learn the difference.

62451728
>>62451705
You're in California, apply for every single possible free service they have and physically go into a government center to get someone to set you up. Just spam apply to absolutely everything and make up Mcdonald's tier work history since they'll almost never call references (even better if you have a friend to lie for you though). Aggressively save every penny when you get a job and you'll be alright. You need to try to force yourself to be as optimistic as possible during the entire process and be comfortable with stretching the truth or coming up with a story about what you were doing, everyone does this.

62451729
>>62451718
Great advice, some of these positions include a dental plan I believe

62451733
>>62451705
Which I just looked up and could cost thousands of dollars. Medical night not cover it either.
>>62451718
The reason no one wants that job is because it sucks. Have you ever changed an adults diapers? I would rather eat buckshot then do that again. Besides, I don't think it pays more than a grocery store cashier anyway.

62451737
>>62451733
You've already done it and have experience in it, honestly this seems like the natural way for you, it's like life has been preparing you to deal with shit, adult shit

62451741
>>62451729
Oh good God, are you serious? I can't do the job anyway.

62451742
>>62451539
People who have worked their whole lives at least have learned HOW to work and have a resume to prove it. But that is really only the bare minimum. There is much more to a fulfilling life, much of which has nothing to do with work or money, but still arises out of self-discipline, skill-development, and emotionally maturity.

62451745
>>62451705
Dentalfag reporting in.
If you post some pics I can tell you which ones could be saved with a crown and which you should have extracted ASAP

62451748
>>62451705
Forgot to add you need to fix your teeth by any means necessary, even if it means ripping that shit out of your head because if you don't it will kill you slowly and painfully by infection. Just aggressively pursue free state services.

62451816
I like these threads, it makes me feel better about my own life. But OP seriously how did you get to this point? You would think alarm bells would be going off in your head at age 25, 30 etc. that you need to get your shit together, for fuck sakes your parents aren't going to live forever.

62451821
>>62451099
It's thievery
He can't admit to crimes nigga
You dense

62451832
>>62451403
Wow shouldn't have cut internet mom lol

62451837
Healthcare or zogbot
Neither a comfy choice, but assuming healthcare, you can start sweeping floors then move up to some sort of auxiliary nurse, nursing assistant, then nurse eventually. You could reach 6 figs, but the path would take a fair amount of humiliation, wiping floors and boomer feces

62451874
>>62451745
This anon is offering something genuinely good for seemingly free.
I'm just noting that

62452257
>>62451063
OP check out this guy sno0ks on YouTube, he has just gone through a similar life experience to you and has vlogged about it: https://m.youtube.com/watch?v=VQsdy_yaQAQ&ra=m

62452288
Go to school
Get work experience
Get a real job
Jesus Christ most people figure this out when they’re 18 years old you god damn retard.

item.title: VOO and Chill — 187 replies — 30.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
VOO and Chill

Open thread • Replies: 187 • Updated: 2026-07-06 14:16 UTC

OP

The more I look into investing and compare the historical returns of certain ETFs / individual stocks it seems like the whole philosophy of “VOO and Chill” is equal parts really smart and retarded
It’s like a no brainer for money but even now as long as the market is in a growth period shouldn’t you at least do QQQ?
It seems so simple that’d you miss a lot of upside but the returns are honestly not bad and extremely consistent
How accurate is this assessment? It’s both so simple and guaranteed that everyone should it but also too safe so you end up missing out on more upside
I’m talking 5-20 years investing here not trading

Early replies (first 3)

62400515
Boomer funds are gay and lame

62400554
>>62400515
What qualifies as one
Why
What crypto do you want to shill

62400560
boglehead method is the tried and tested way, buy the market with an index fund that has a low fee, invest monthly, do it consistently for decades and you WILL be rich
but biz/anons don't care about being rich when they're older, they want to be rich NOW
greed is a deadly sin

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62429683
>>62400493
Anon there is nothing wrong with doing VOO and chill if you have time and principal
Going into wildly volatile ETFs can be okay if it’s a satellite account
Just be careful of FOMO and not being risk averse
You sound like you have a good head on your shoulders though
Remember this is money, real money, your money

62430693
VOO anons where you at?

62430902
>>62400493
Contrarian nerds always lose.
Always.
In middle school dating.
Being high school incels.
In college.
At work.
In love.
At investing.
At all times.
Follow the crowd and try to fit in. Everyone doing anything else is a reject loser.

62431131
>>62430902
Who is being the contrarian here though

62431374
VOO is managed by 2 girl bosses, Michelle Louie & Aurélie Denis. So with your 0.03% management fee you're essentially paying for those do-nothing "day in the life of a portfolio manager" videos for daughters of elite sociopaths.

62431402
>>62431374
A small price to pay for a low expense ratio

62431920
>>62431131
Anyone trying to beat VOO over decades.

62431922
>>62431920
Feel like VUG has consistently beaten VOO though

62431971
>>62431922
Contrarian.
I own VUG and don't own VOO tho :)

62432023
>>62431920
fair enough
thoughts on a younger person doing QQQM?

62434054
Anyone have thoughts or realized returns and experiences on VOO + satellite
accounts instead of just VOO

62435372
Was gonna try to go into this DRAM dip but decided to just do more VOO
But idk a higher return ETF still sounds promising and like a no brainer whether it’s SOXX or QQQM but QQQ has so much crossover with VOO it’s just redundant and only good for growth seasons
I guess this is why VOO and Chill exists to just stop thinking

62436303
>>62431920
What about QQQ though

62436357
i boughted my daily VOO
i'll keep dealing the real world like a good goyim in the mean time.

62436478
>>62436357
huzzah brother

62436499
>>62400493
Where my VGT bros at?

62436507
>>62400636
>Yes and I'm sure that used car and maybe a holiday you can buy with it when you're 65 from cashing out all your investments will be great.....
You say this as if the average /biz/ shitcoin gambler is performing better than VOO which is definitely not the case.

62436510
>>62428031
Your IQ is so actually low. Holy shit.

62436538
>>62436510
Do you think DRAM has value, honest question, and for how long - if so, what dip should one wait for
>>62436499
VGT and QQQ are only doing better thanks to tech having such strong performances for years now, correct?
VOO seems safe since you don't know the future, but on the other hand, thinking the future of the market for the next decades wont always be tech focused seems so short sighted it's silly.....maybe I should start DCA into VGT?

62436562
>>62400493
>VOO
it's EVOO for me lads

62438775
Yep bros
Bought some more VOO and am waiting on my DRAM position to go green so I can sell and not have to deal with thematic ETFs no high expense ratios ever again
Simple as

62440169
>>62431374
>VOO is managed by 2 girl bosses
VOO is passively managed. These 2 girls are not like Kathy Wood picking stocks.

62442752
>>62431374
They could boil alive eat grannies alive for all I care as long as they get the money going, what kind of faggot ass train of thought is this. They could become billionaires and I would not give a shit as long as it keeps compounding. "The people making me rich are foids so it makes me icky" is unironically the foidest take I have ever read.
>>62430902
A year ago I started investing for the first time in my life (I'm in my mid 20s) and thought I was very smart and I would just outperform the market 1% profit at a time. After a whole year I only managed to get a net benefit of a 3% after wasting many hours and carrying heavy bags. I learnt my lesson. VOO and chill.

62442988
>>62442752
>They could become billionaires and I would not give a shit as long as it keeps compounding.

The portfolio managers of VOO have 0 control over whether VOO compounds or not. VOO is simply an ETF that tracks the S&P 500. Their only job is to make sure VOO follows the S&P 500. Once the fund is set up, there really is not much for them to do. I guess if they haven't automated removing and adding companies to the composition of VOO, then they do that.

62444521
Let’s all say thank you to Jack Bogle

62444531
>>62400515
and yet boomers hold 90% of the wealth and growing...

62445651
>>62421799
>5+ yr 60% drawdown event happens
>buy cheaper voo

62446571
>>62444521
thanks chad bogle

62447653
>>62445651
Kek it really is that simple

62450991
>>62446571
Thanks Chad Bogle!

item.title: Index dogs justify your life — 16 replies — 19.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
Index dogs justify your life

Open thread • Replies: 16 • Updated: 2026-07-06 19:37 UTC

OP

Adjusted for inflation, half of the decades the S&P 500 yields ZERO return.
You could buy the S&P 500 each month for the next 20 years, and it wouldn't be out of the ordinary if at the end of these 20 years you would have had ZERO returns - adjusted for inflation.

Early replies (first 3)

62451667
>>62451639
So i should exit now and get back in in 2040?

62451701
>>62451639
I mean, it's still worthwhile as an inflation hedge and therefore the base of your portfolio. But yeah, an index fund won't make you rich. It just allows you to save your money. The only way to make money is by picking and trading individual stocks, which is beyond what most people can do while maintaining their full time job.

62451785
>voofaggots convinced me not to buy ai stocks
>this was 8 months ago and now they're up 800%
Never trust voogroids.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62451805
>>62451639
>years arbitrarily chosen to capture major stock market depressions
>neglects to mention that the point of dca is to keep buying at the lows as well
You're retarded if you fall for this obvious demoralization.
Keep gambling on memes and stay poor forever, niggers.

62451807
>>62451639
Wow when things are good they’re good and when they’re bad they’re basically just 0 and not negative
This is so bad, you should’ve known what to short during 08 instead or perfectly hedged against the dot com bubble in another way baka

62451824
>>62451639
0 stress
Guaranteed line go up
Just dollar cost average in over time
Beat 95% of hedge funds
It's literally the best move for 99% of humans.

62451829
yes a bear market happens once a decade
yes we are probably due for one
but I'll continue to participate. it could go up 30% from here before going down 20% in a bear correction.

62451922
>>62451701
Thats retarded tho, these companies are getting a free ride basically. You should refuse to index invest on principle because these incompetent fucks cant make money

62451938
>>62451922
I roundtripped the gold run up, got 60-80% gains on the recent chip bull and had the presence of mind to sell.

Then I was feeling frisky and took a small position in 2xDRAM etf and got smoked down 30%. said fuck this and put everything in VOO. I’m done researching everyday and envisioning my theses playing out and adjusting fuck this shit

62452140
>>62451639
The truth of the matter is, most index investors are retards. They’re too stupid to buy AMD, NVDA, MU, and SNDK. They won’t even buy SPCX which will be the first $50T company in history

62452156
>>62451829
>>62451639
wHaT dO YoU mEAN StOCKs cAN go DOWN???

Holy shit zoomers are tard maxed. This is why the traditional advice has been to gradually increase exposure to bonds as one approaches retirement age.

"Maaaan that means I gotta save money and shit"

Yeah, the wages of sin is death, if you don't work you die, etc etc

62452157
>>62452140
Yeah index investors don’t buy those they just buy an index that includes those
Hope this helps!

62452218
>>62451824
I dont think you do beat 95% of hedgefunds

62452222
>>62452157
stay poor!
Hope this helps

62452252
>>62451805
>dca
So you're telling me I should DCA something that was invented 10 years ago when everything was blooming, and I should do it for the next 15 years when everything will be dumping?

62452275
>>62452156
are you well? you sound schizophrenic

item.title: my brother-in-law is a literal genius, like 150+ IQ, and worked his ass off over the last 15 years or so to become a suc… — 38 replies — 17.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
my brother-in-law is a literal genius, like 150+ IQ, and worked his ass off over the last 15 years or so to become a suc…

Open thread • Replies: 38 • Updated: 2026-07-06 18:17 UTC

OP

my brother-in-law is a literal genius, like 150+ IQ, and worked his ass off over the last 15 years or so to become a successful entrepreneur and just completely failed. he's flat broke now. it's crazy to me how hard it is to make good money even if you're smart and hardworking. the world is fucking brutal.

Early replies (first 3)

62449875
>>62449873
“Smart” and didn’t go all in crypto. I shiggy diggy

62449876
Almost like being a business owner is just being a wagie with more work and all of your capital at risk.

62449881
>>62449876
Nah that's being self employed, an entrepreneur convertes other peoples time and labour into money

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62449926
>>62449909
this is also true. relying on extrinsic outcome motivation is a 100% guaranteed way to an perma incel doomloop with the end-stage being suicide

62449942
>>62449909
Name one successful poojeet franchise

62449948
>>62449942
This is more white incel loser cope

>waaaah anyone who calls out my crybaby behavior is an Indian, a foid or a joo

Grow up

62449954
>>62449873
If he gives up after one failure he's not going to make it through the next 5 failures that will eventually teach him how to succeed

also geniuses don't usually do great at business. The sweet spot for starting a business is in the 100-120 range. Smart enough to make good decisions but dumb enough not to give up when things go wrong anyways.

62449984
>>62449948
Lol poojeet fails to name a brand and seethes

62449992
>>62449984
Not him but that one pajeet was smart with providing Indians with free internet which then destroyed the internet for the rest of the world.

62449994
>>62449992
Steve poojobs? He did look a little bit indian at the end

62450060
>>62449873
He's probably too smart. He want to create great things that revolutionize peoples lives, but the easiest way to make it is to scam stupid people.

62450077
>>62449984
Why would a poojeet take orders from a white incel loser? Y'all lower caste than dalits. Know your place and lower your tone

62450101
>>62449873
I got paid a full day at my job on Thursday for LITERALLY doing nothing but writing my magnum opus novel, watching my niece and playing pokemon showdown.


It's a skill issue. Not an IQ one.

62450119
>>62449876

If you work “in” the business it’s just like owning your job.

62450121
>>62449942

Tata motors which owns Jaguar and Land Rover.

62450123
>>62450101

You have a job tho, it’s different than trying to start a business

62450129
>>62449887
top silicon valley ceos are all high iq, top wallstreet executives too, there's just no way you can survive that kind of environment without constantly observing obscure patterns, so your shallow analysis doesn't track
>>62449873
your brother in law probably failed because he wasn't part of the group, he probably tried to muscle into someone else's turf, what business was he into?

62450177
>>62450121
I know of someone who own a land rover, a newer model. He went for a drive in sand with it and the engine burned out, he got it replaced and went down to the beach to drive over sand dunes. Engine burned out again

Lmao aryan quality, I didn't know tata acquired land rover in 2008 but it makes sense now

62450181
>>62450077
You took your vaccines like a good cattle everyone knows you poojoos are the most subservient minions

62450429
>>62450077
Castes aren't a real thing it's some turdjeet larp among themselves.
In reality there's only turdjeets and actual human (white) people.

62450441
>>62450429
Face it you white incel losers are the lowest caste people in the world. Unlike Indians NO ONE likes you or wants you around AND you are BROKE

62450451
>>62450441
Get off that white dick poopoid

62450460
>>62450451
Post some more about how you are broke and depressed but deserve an easy life because you are white

62450481
>>62450460
I deserve an easy life and I have an easy life while you're broke and depressed and looking for some dick

62450485
>>62449873
I'm retarded and have made millions.
Just the way it goes sometimes OP.
Being smart isn't a ticket to success crazy enough.

62450500
>>62449873
BTDT. I was lucky that Bitcoin came along when it did or I'd be living in a cardboard box sucking off meth addicts.

62450584
>>62449873
>150+ IQ
>worked his ass off over the last 15 years
158 IQ here. Only one of those statements can be true (probably the 2nd). If he were actually that smart he'd have known how to optimize things so he didn't need to work his ass off. I've been loafing about the last few decades and my liquid net worth is just over $4m having barely lifted a finger.

62450615
>>62450584

This is where we mention there is autistic "intelligent", and then there is intuition. Some people can solve anything you put in front of them but can't inductively synthesize a shrewd or creative idea. AI brain, basically lol.

62450621
>>62449887
High IQ overthink, underact, avoid risk taking
>AAAHH! I have tooo thiiiiiink first
Low IQ underthing, overact and dont even register risk

62450636
>>62450584
Wanna invest in my super secret club?

62450659
Naybe OP isn't.smart enough to recognize whether somebody os a genius. What if the brother in law is actually a dumb ass and has people fooled?

62451127
>>62449873
These bots think they are posting their demoralization threads on reddit now

62452004
>>62449873
making it is more about emotional regulation than about iq past like 110 or so
